text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh no! I was supposed to be drilling for the
upcoming quiz!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Time to get back to it! All I've gotta do is
copy down all the basic formulas! Ten notebooks
worth...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is enthusiastic about getting her
grades up. Unfortunately, it seems like the
constant studying has left her exhausted.
